---
title: R/Pharma GenAI Day Schedule
subtitle: Our third genAI single day event
description: |
  Free virtual conference on the use of genAI in Pharma.
categories:
  - genAI-day
author: R/Pharma
date: 2026-05-12
image: markus-winkler-_a97xDX9eZg-unsplash.jpg
image-alt: "genAI Image"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="schedule.css">
---

We are excited to share the schedule for the third **R/Pharma genAI** day, a free single day event focused on examples of using generative and agentic artificial intelligence with an emphasis in the drug development space and clinical domain.

For talk abstracts and speaker bios, check out our [conference page](/docs/ai-day/index.qmd).

```{r}
#| echo: FALSE
library(yaml)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(htmltools)

file <- "./schedule.yml"
raw <- yaml::read_yaml(file)

normalize_speakers <- function(s) {
  if (is.null(s)) return(NULL)
  lapply(s, function(x) {
    list(
      name = x$name,
      affiliation = if (!is.null(x$affiliation) && nzchar(x$affiliation)) x$affiliation else NULL
    )
  })
}

schedule <- tibble(
  time = map_chr(raw, "time"),
  type = map_chr(raw, "type"),
  title = map_chr(raw, "title"),
  duration = map_chr(raw, "duration"),
  speakers = map(raw, ~ normalize_speakers(.x$speakers))
)

speaker_tag <- function(name, affiliation) {

  has_text <- function(x) {
    !is.null(x) && length(x) == 1 && !is.na(x) && nzchar(x)
  }

  label <- name
  if (has_text(affiliation)) {
    label <- paste0(name, " (", affiliation, ")")
  }

  tags$span(class = "speaker", label)
}

speakers_block <- function(speakers) {

  if (is.null(speakers) || length(speakers) == 0) return(NULL)

  if (length(speakers) == 1 && is.list(speakers[[1]]) && !is.null(speakers[[1]][[1]]$name)) {
    speakers <- speakers[[1]]
  }

  tagList(
    purrr::imap(speakers, function(sp, i) {
      tagList(
        speaker_tag(
          sp$name %||% "",
          sp$affiliation %||% NULL
        ),
        if (i < length(speakers)) ", "
      )
    })
  )
}

render_row <- function(row) {

  if (row$type == "break") {
    return(
      tags$div(class = "schedule-row break",
        tags$div(class = "time", row$time),
        tags$div(class = "content",
          tags$strong(row$title),
          tags$span(class = "duration", row$duration)
        )
      )
    )
  }

  tags$div(class = "schedule-row talk",
    tags$div(class = "time", row$time),
    tags$div(class = "content",

      speakers_block(row$speakers),

      if (!is.null(row$speakers) && length(row$speakers) > 0) tags$br(),

      tags$div(class = "title-row",
        tags$span(class = "talk-title", row$title),
        tags$span(class = "duration", row$duration)
      )
    )
  )
}

schedule_html <- tags$div(
  class = "schedule-container",
  tagList(
    lapply(seq_len(nrow(schedule)), function(i) {
      render_row(schedule[i, ])
    })
  )
)
```

```{r}
#| echo: FALSE
#| output: asis
schedule_html
```

### {.citation-image}
Photo by <a href="https://unsplash.com/@markuswinkler?utm_source=unsplash&utm_medium=referral&utm_content=creditCopyText">Markus Winkler</a> on <a href="https://unsplash.com/photos/a-close-up-of-an-old-fashioned-typewriter-_a97xDX9eZg?utm_source=unsplash&utm_medium=referral&utm_content=creditCopyText">Unsplash</a>

###
